mapper.select:
SELECT a.comname as comName, a.username as userName, a.usercode as userCode, a.groups, a.groupscode as groupsCode, max(a.tjtime) as maxTjTime, sum(ck_jsl) as ckJsl, sum(ck_jsl_wcl) as ckJslWcl, sum(ck_wcl) as ckWcl, sum(ds_tjl) as dsTjl, sum(ds_wcl) as dsWcl, sum(ds_zfl) as dsZfl, sum(shougen) as shouGen, sum(hougen) as houGen, sum(tiaojie) as tiaoJie, sum(ja) as ja, sum(zl) as zl FROM acd_dangri_gzl_ry a WHERE a.groups is not null AND a.groupscode not in ('5101701','5101702','5101703') AND a.tjdate >= #{startDate} AND a.tjdate <= #{endDate}
AND a.comname like concat('%', #{comName}, '%')
AND a.groups like concat('%', #{groups}, '%')
AND a.username like concat('%', #{userName}, '%')
GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5 ORDER BY comName desc
SELECT MAX(tjdate) FROM ${tableName}

SELECT a.comcode as comCode, a.comname as comName, a.groups as groups, a.groupscode as groupsCode, max(a.tjtime) as maxTjTime, sum(ck_jsl) as ckJsl, sum(ck_jsl_wcl) as ckJslWcl, sum(ck_wcl) as ckWcl, sum(ds_tjl) as dsTjl, sum(ds_wcl) as dsWcl, sum(ds_zfl) as dsZfl, sum(shougen) as shouGen, sum(hougen) as houGen, sum(tiaojie) as tiaoJie, sum(ja) as ja, sum(zl) as zl FROM acd_dangri_gzl_group a WHERE a.tjdate >= #{startDate} AND a.tjdate <= #{endDate} AND a.groups is not null AND a.groupscode not in ('5101701','5101702','5101703')
AND a.comname like concat('%', #{comName}, '%')
AND a.groups like concat('%', #{groups}, '%')
GROUP BY 1,2,3,4 ORDER BY comName desc, groupsCode asc

select tjdate, tjdate as maxTjTime, comcode, comname, zhouqi_zt, zhouqi_wyn, zhouqi_wys, chakan_zt, cuiding_zt, dingsun_zt, zhifu_zt from acd_zhouqi_bm where 1 = 1 and tjdate = #{tjDate} and comcode like '510199%' and comcode not in ('51019928','51019926','51019911','51019907','51019944')
and comname like concat('%', #{comname}, '%')
order by zhouqi_zt desc

select case when a.comname ='理赔中心在线理赔分部' then 1 when a.comname ='理赔中心线下理赔分部' then 2 when a.comname ='非成都查勘-非人' then 3 when a.comname ='非成都查勘-涉人' then 4 when a.comname ='理赔中心新能源/网约车分部' then 5 when a.comname ='理赔中心商用车分部' then 6 when a.comname ='理赔中心人伤分部' then 7 when a.comname ='工程机械' then 8 when a.comname ='电梯' then 9 when a.comname ='中心整体' then 10 else 99 end idd, a.*, a.tjdate as maxTjTime, a.wjl-a.wjl_fr as rswj, round(a.yjl/a.xzl,4) lajal, (a.wjl-a.wjl_fr)/a.wjl as rs_zb from acd_pacll_bm a where a.tjdate = #{tjDate} and a.comname is not null and a.comcode not in ('51019944','51019907') and a.comname <> '个非'
and a.comname like concat('%', #{comname}, '%')
order by idd

select distinct b.comname, a.*, a.tjdate as maxTjTime, round(a.wjl_rs/wjl,4) rs_pp from acd_pacll_xz a, acd_ryzd b where a.groupscode = b.groupscode AND a.tjdate = #{tjDate}
and b.comname like concat('%', #{comname}, '%')
and b.groups like concat('%', #{groups}, '%')
order by b.groupscode asc

select case when a.bm ='理赔中心在线理赔分部' then 1 when a.bm ='理赔中心线下理赔分部' then 2 when a.bm ='非成都查勘-非人' then 3 when a.bm ='非成都查勘-涉人' then 4 when a.bm ='理赔中心新能源/网约车分部' then 5 when a.bm ='理赔中心商用车分部' then 6 when a.bm ='理赔中心人伤分部' then 7 when a.bm ='工程机械' then 8 when a.bm ='电梯' then 9 when a.bm ='中心整体' then 10 else 99 end idd, a.*, a.tjdate as maxTjTime, round(a.yjajl/a.xzajl,4) lajal from acd_pacll_ry a where a.tjdate= #{tjDate} and a.bm not like '%人伤%' and a.bm not like '%理算%' and a.bm not like '%科技%' and a.bm not like '%管理%' and groups is not null and a.usercode not in ('25332446')
and a.bm like concat('%', #{bm}, '%')
and a.groups like concat('%', #{groups}, '%')
and a.username like concat('%', #{username}, '%')
order by idd, groups
select * , tjdate as maxTjTime from acd_rs_gzl_year where 1 = 1 and tjdate= #{tjDate} and jaflag = '后续跟踪' and comname like '%人伤%' order by hj desc
select * , tjdate as maxTjTime from acd_rs_gzl_year where 1 = 1 and tjdate= #{tjDate} and jaflag = '人伤调解' order by hj desc

select count(*) from acd_chakan_year where 1 = 1 and tjdate= #{tjDate}
and comname_sgs like concat('%', #{comnameSgs}, '%')

select count(*) from acd_dingsun_tjl_year where 1 = 1 and tjdate= #{tjDate}
and comname_sgs like concat('%', #{comnameSgs}, '%')

select count(*) from acd_dingsun_wcl_year where 1 = 1 and tjdate= #{tjDate}
and comname_sgs like concat('%', #{comnameSgs}, '%')

select count(*) from acd_ck_dswc_year where 1 = 1 and tjdate= #{tjDate}
and comname_sgs like concat('%', #{comnameSgs}, '%')

select count(*) from acd_dingsun_zfl_year where 1 = 1 and tjdate= #{tjDate}
and comname_sgs like concat('%', #{comnameSgs}, '%')

select count(*) from acd_lisuan_year where 1 = 1 and tjdate= #{tjDate}
and comname_sgs like concat('%', #{comnameSgs}, '%')
select * , tjdate as maxTjTime from acd_rs_gzl_year where 1 = 1 and tjdate= #{tjDate} and jaflag = '后续跟踪' and comname like '%人伤%' order by hj desc limit #{limit} offset #{offset}
select count(*) from acd_rs_gzl_year where 1 = 1 and tjdate= #{tjDate} and jaflag = '后续跟踪' and comname like '%人伤%'
select * , tjdate as maxTjTime from acd_rs_gzl_year where 1 = 1 and tjdate= #{tjDate} and jaflag = '人伤调解' order by hj desc limit #{limit} offset #{offset}
select count(*) from acd_rs_gzl_year where 1 = 1 and tjdate= #{tjDate} and jaflag = '人伤调解'

select count(*) from acd_chakan_month where 1 = 1 and tjdate= #{tjDate}
and comname_sgs like concat('%', #{comnameSgs}, '%')

select count(*) from ( SELECT a.comname, a.username, a.usercode, a.groups, a.groupscode FROM acd_dangri_gzl_ry a WHERE a.groups is not null AND a.groupscode not in ('5101701','5101702','5101703') AND a.tjdate >= #{startDate} AND a.tjdate <= #{endDate}
AND a.comname like concat('%', #{comName}, '%')
AND a.groups like concat('%', #{groups}, '%')
AND a.username like concat('%', #{userName}, '%')
GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5 ) t

SELECT a.comcode as comCode, a.comname as comName, a.groups as groups, a.groupscode as groupsCode, a.tjdate as tjDate, max(a.tjtime) as maxTjTime, sum(ck_jsl) as ckJsl, sum(ck_jsl_wcl) as ckJslWcl, sum(ck_wcl) as ckWcl, sum(ds_tjl) as dsTjl, sum(ds_wcl) as dsWcl, sum(ds_zfl) as dsZfl, sum(shougen) as shouGen, sum(hougen) as houGen, sum(tiaojie) as tiaoJie, sum(ja) as ja, sum(zl) as zl FROM acd_dangri_gzl_group a WHERE a.tjdate >= #{startDate} AND a.tjdate <= #{endDate} AND a.groups is not null AND a.groupscode not in ('5101701','5101702','5101703')
AND a.comname like concat('%', #{comName}, '%')
AND a.groups like concat('%', #{groups}, '%')
GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5 ORDER BY comName desc, groupsCode asc limit #{limit} offset #{offset}

select count(*) from ( SELECT a.comcode, a.comname, a.groups, a.groupscode, a.tjdate FROM acd_dangri_gzl_group a WHERE a.tjdate >= #{startDate} AND a.tjdate <= #{endDate} AND a.groups is not null AND a.groupscode not in ('5101701','5101702','5101703')
AND a.comname like concat('%', #{comName}, '%')
AND a.groups like concat('%', #{groups}, '%')
GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5 ) t

select count(*) from acd_zhouqi_qs where 1 = 1 and tjdate = #{tjDate}
and comname_sgs like concat('%', #{comnameSgs}, '%')

select count(*) from acd_zhouqi_bm where 1 = 1 and tjdate = #{tjDate} and comcode like '510199%' and comcode not in ('51019928','51019926','51019911','51019907','51019944')
and comname like concat('%', #{comname}, '%')

select count(*) from acd_zhpfl_khq where 1 = 1 and tjdate = #{tjDate}
and comname_sgs like concat('%', #{comnameSgs}, '%')

select count(*) from acd_pacll_bm a where a.tjdate = #{tjDate} and a.comname is not null and a.comcode not in ('51019944','51019907') and a.comname <> '个非'
and a.comname like concat('%', #{comname}, '%')

select case when a.bm ='理赔中心在线理赔分部' then 1 when a.bm ='理赔中心线下理赔分部' then 2 when a.bm ='非成都查勘-非人' then 3 when a.bm ='非成都查勘-涉人' then 4 when a.bm ='理赔中心新能源/网约车分部' then 5 when a.bm ='理赔中心商用车分部' then 6 when a.bm ='理赔中心人伤分部' then 7 when a.bm ='工程机械' then 8 when a.bm ='电梯' then 9 when a.bm ='中心整体' then 10 else 99 end idd, a.*, a.tjdate as maxTjTime, round(a.yjajl/a.xzajl,4) lajal from acd_pacll_ry a where a.tjdate= #{tjDate} and a.bm not like '%人伤%' and a.bm not like '%理算%' and a.bm not like '%科技%' and a.bm not like '%管理%' and groups is not null and a.usercode not in ('25332446')
and a.bm like concat('%', #{bm}, '%')
and a.groups like concat('%', #{groups}, '%')
and a.username like concat('%', #{username}, '%')
order by idd, groups limit #{limit} offset #{offset}

select count(*) from acd_pacll_ry a where a.tjdate= #{tjDate} and a.bm not like '%人伤%' and a.bm not like '%理算%' and a.bm not like '%科技%' and a.bm not like '%管理%' and groups is not null and a.usercode not in ('25332446')
and a.bm like concat('%', #{bm}, '%')
and a.groups like concat('%', #{groups}, '%')
and a.username like concat('%', #{username}, '%')
